since_last: 33% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.10%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.34% · BTC +2.91% · Gold +1.58% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 33% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.10%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.10%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -7.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -13.65%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +11.28%, ISRG +5.07%, ADBE +4.95%, ADBE +4.95%, WDAY +4.78%. Laggards: TER -13.65%, KLAC -13.62%, AMBA -11.26%, LRCX -11.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.88% at $158.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.88% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
